homepage.title: Industrial trucks from the specialist for demanding loads | Genkinger
homepage.description: Genkinger builds industrial trucks as custom products from scratch from the ground up. All of our forklifts, pallet trucks, tractors, tool changers or lifting tables exactly meet the specific requirements of our Requirements of our customers - for manipulating, storing or picking heavy and and bulky loads such as goods, materials, assemblies or Tools.
